pageContext.name: Emma Frost
pageContext.description: Of course I'm a threat. Why? Did you think for a moment that I wasn't?   Sideshow Art Prints presents the Emma Frost Fine Art Print, a dazzling original Marvel Comics art print by artist Serafleur.  As cold as ice and as brilliant as a finely cut gem, mutant Emma Frost is not one to be trifled with. In addition to her powerful wealth and family name, her telepathic abilities and organic diamond form make her a true force of influence and strength among the X-Men. Serafleur's signature sparkling style emphasizes Emma's flawless sense of fashion as she begins to transform before the viewer's eyes. Though she may have a cool demeanor, the White Queen can still rain hellfire down on anyone who tries to undermine her.  Each Emma Frost Fine Art Print features an authorized, automated artist signature and an embossed Seal of Authenticity as a part of the limited edition of 375 pieces. Available as an unframed giclée or in a custom framed presentation, this radiant X-Men artwork brings a touch of mutant class to any fan's Marvel collection.  Consider this your personal invitation to the Hellfire Club — bring home the Emma Frost Fine Art Print by Serafleur today!
